item.title: 【ホロライブ】ときのそら、9周年記念イベント「9th Anniversary Party」をぴあアリーナMMで開催決定！「夢は、ひとつ先のステージへ」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の「ときのそら」さんが、自身のX（旧Twitter）および公式情報を更新し、活動9周年を記念するイベント『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』の開催を特報として発表しました。開催日は2026年11月7日（土）、会場は数多くのアーティストが伝説を残してきた「ぴあアリーナMM」です。特報を受け、ファン（そらとも）の間では早くも期待の声が高まっています。横浜の地に響き渡る歌声と、記念すべきパーティーがどのようなものになるのか、11月の開催に向けて注目が集まります。『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』は、2026年11月7日（土）にぴあアリーナMMにて開催予定です。

item.title: 常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんのサイン入り色紙が当たる！『灰仭巫覡』新PV＆オリジナルソング公開記念キャンペーン開催
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 大暮維人先生が描く人気漫画『灰仭巫覡（カイジンフゲキ）』のオリジナルソングと新PVの公開を記念し、2025年9月5日より豪華プレゼントキャンペーンがスタートしました。新PV公開！常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんが歌うオリジナルソング2025年9月3日、講談社の「マガジンチャンネル」にて『灰仭巫覡』の新たなプロモーションビデオが公開されました。このPVのために書き下ろされたオリジナルソング『君と明かした夜』は、ホロライブ所属の人気VTuberである常闇トワさんと獅白ぼたんさんが歌唱を担当。今回の発表を記念して、抽選で1名様にが当たるキャンペーンが開催されます。『灰仭巫覡』公式X（旧Twitter）アカウント（@KAIJINFUGEKI_WM）をフォロー ※「#灰仭巫覡PV公開」「#カイジンフゲキ」のハッシュタグが付いたポストが目印です。 2025年9月5日（金）0:00 〜 2025年9月14日（日）23:59まで 利用規約に同意し、日本国内にお住まいで郵便物・宅配物の受け取りが可能な方。注意事項：色紙には当選者の宛名が記載されます。当選者にはXのダイレクトメッセージにて連絡があります。 『灰仭巫覡』コミックス第1巻から第5巻まで好評発売中です。

item.title: 【速報】戌神ころね、ホンダのeスポーツ大会アンバサダーに2年連続で就任！→本人も「よろしくお願いします」と意気込み「世界の戌神」「今年もきた！」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 人気VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」所属の戌神ころねさんが、本田技研工業（Honda）が主催するeモータースポーツのグローバル大会「Honda Racing eMS 2025」の公式アンバサダーに、昨年に引き続き就任したことが発表されました。このニュースに、ファンからは「2年連続はすごすぎる！」「今年も応援します！」といった声が相次いでいます。「Honda Racing eMS」は、世界3地区（アジア・オセアニア、米州、欧州・中東・アフリカ）のトップドライバーたちが地域最速の座をかけて競い合う、本格的なeモータースポーツのグローバル大会です。戌神さんは「Honda Racing eMS 2024」でもアンバサダーを務めており、今回で2年連続という大役を担うことになります。ゲーム実況で人気を誇る戌神ころねと、世界のHondaとのコラボが再び実現しました。2025年8月26日、Honda Racing eMSの公式X（旧Twitter）アカウントが「━ Honda Racing eMS 2025 開催 ━ 昨年に続き『戌神ころね』が公式アンバサダーに！」とポストし、戌神さんのアンバサダー就任を正式に発表。あわせて、されるという大会スケジュールも公開しました。この公式発表に対し、戌神さん本人も自身のXアカウントで「今年もアンバサダーを務めさせていただきます！よろしくお願いします」と引用ポストし、就任への意気込みを表明しました。この就任のニュースに、ファンからは「世界のHondaに認められた女、戌神ころね」「ころさんの影響力すごい！」「これを機にレースゲームに挑戦してみようかな」など、驚きと喜びのコメントがありました。

item.title: 【EXPO & 7th.fes 2026】グッズ関連情報まとめ / 関東近郊イベント・キャンペーンまとめ
item.author: jun3720
item.content:encoded: このページはEXPO・フェスのグッズや特典、ノベルティ情報のみを集約したものです。イベント詳細につきましては公式サイトをご覧ください。※公式サイトや各企業より発表された内容のみ記載しています。※当日発表される情報や未公開情報は含まれません。オフィシャルグッズが購入できるエリアEXPO または fesのチケットを持ってる方が入場できます。︎現地受け取り事前販売2月19日20:00〜26日23:59︎当日販売3月6日9:00 ～ 8日18:00︎事後通販3月6日12:00〜4月27日18:00EXPO または fesのチケットを持ってる方が入場できます。・ファンクラブ会員限定「EXPOオリジナルステッカー」プレゼント（ファンクラブ内特設ページからの事前予約制）オリジナルフード・ドリンクが購入できるエリア（複製手書きPOPカード・ランチョンマット・コースターなど特典あり）︎先行販売2月20日20:00～26日23:59︎当日販売3月6〜8日 9:30〜17:30「Advent VS Justice」オリジナルアパレル実物展⽰今回のEXPO＆ fes.イベントオリジナルグッズを展示企画参加した方の中から抽選で当選された方に特典プレゼント・未来のシリーズデザイン会場限定ウエハースカード配布（各日なくなり次第終了）・先行ガシャポン販売・今後販売予定の商品展示・新作フィギュア展示・最新フィギュア化情報公開予定・過去のプライズ、最新アイテムを展示・受注販売予定のぽこべぇ1/1フィギュアお披露目・超特大「もちぴこBIGぬいぐるみ」の限定展示フォトスポット・クレーンゲームで「寝そべりミニマスコット」を先行ゲット(有料プレイ)・オリジナルデザインのステッカー9種をランダム配布・hololiveEN コラボPC展開中（展示あり？）・マーケットエリアにてコラボグッズ販売あり・hololive×Anideal 第3弾 香水の展示・香り付きムエット配布・ミッションをクリアしてノベルティプレゼント（ノベルティは一人１枚・なくなり次第終了）・新作の等身大フィギュアとスケールフィギュアをお披露目・オリジナルブランド「AXGRIT」新作フィギュア発表、ジオラマ展示・フィギュアシリーズ PalVerseの展示・最新フィギュア化情報発表・カラオケ大会開催（例年通りであればポスターなどがもらえる可能性あり）・「スズキ × ホロライブ」コラボ展示（グッズ展開は現時点では不明）3月6〜8日に関東付近でおこなわれているイベント・コラボをまとめました。地方から訪れる方、海外ニキ、ホロリス同士での交流・観光のご参考にどうぞ。hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station︎場所東京駅『東京キャラクターストリート』︎内容ホロライブグッズ取扱(「hololive TRAVEL」シリーズVol.3販売開始)成田空港「hololive Meet Pop up Shop」との連動企画hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport!︎場所成田空港︎内容hololive Meet アンバサダーグッズ販売「魔法少女ホロウィッチ！」 完結記念フェア&POPUP in ゲーマーズ︎場所東京都秋葉原（その他地方にも対象店舗あり）︎内容対象商品購入で書き下ろししおりプレゼントホロライブゲーマーズ × 極楽湯 RAKUSPA フロライフ コラボ︎場所関東14店舗あり︎内容グッズ販売、コラボフード、ノベルティ配布、コラボ風呂などホロツリねぽらぼ POP-UP SHOP & CAFE ︎場所ツリービレッジ東京店（東京都墨田区）︎内容グッズ販売、コラボフード、ノベルティ配布などhololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 ～みるハコで叫べ愛のコール～みるハコ視聴 DAY1︎場所カラオケ「JOYSOUND」対象店舗︎内容ライブ視聴（グッズ付きチケットあり）︎場所関東に対象店舗複数あり︎内容限定プライズグッズ設置、投入金額に応じてノベルティプレゼント、限定装飾店などモンハンワイルズ × ホロライブ ねぽらぼコラボカフェ︎場所カプコンカフェ池袋（大阪梅田にも対象店舗あり）︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、ノベルティ配布など︎場所東京会場(新宿)︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、ノベルティ配布などホロライブ×狭山スキー場 「Sayama hololive Snow Party」︎場所狭山スキー場（埼玉県所沢市）︎内容コラボフード、オリジナルグッズ販売、謎解きイベントなど︎場所東京を中心に多数店舗あり︎内容コラボさくら餡たい焼き販売、グッズ販売など︎場所東京・千葉合わせて250店舗以上あり︎内容hololive OFFICIAL CARD GAME プレゼント、点数を集めてグッズゲットなど

item.title: “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth” Event Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!On March 13, 2026, a virtual concert titled “Aki Rosenthal Birthday Encore in Holoearth,” featuring Aki Rosenthal from hololive production, will take place in Holoearth.Virtual Concert “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth”In Holoearth, become your own avatar and share the same space as Aki Rosenthal. Enjoy an immersive experience from your favorite perspective within arm’s reach.This event will also feature exclusive MC segments you can only see in Holoearth, along with a special venue, stage production, and cheer items.Stay tuned for more details! Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth March 13 (Fri), 2026 at 21:00 (JST) (Schedule is subject to change.)

hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S) is coming to Singapore on May 16, 2026!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: February 16, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce its participation in the special event, “hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S).” This event will be held in Singapore on May 16, 2026 as part of the 60th Anniversary of the Establishment of Diplomatic Relations between Japan and Singapore (SJ60).Four globally recognized hololive production talents representing different regions will participate: (hololive / Tokyo Tourism Ambassador): #hololive_SJ60: hololive production Special Day with Albirex Niigata FC (S): Saturday, May 16, 2026: Jurong East Stadium (Singapore): Albirex Niigata Singapore vs Young Lions: 3,500 spectators: SGD 21 (± JPY 2,500): DOU Creations Pte Ltd: Football Association of Singapore* The football match will be held as an official Singapore Premier League fixture. Separate match tickets are required.On match day, the stadium will be transformed into a unique entertainment experience combining real sports and virtual culture.Planned highlights include: ・ Screening of original music videos ・ Special greetings & Q&A session (pre-recorded) ・ Multilingual challenge segment ・ Exclusive halftime performanceIn addition, Mori Calliope is scheduled to host a YouTube mirror livestream, allowing fans worldwide to enjoy the event online.■ Livestream Schedule (Subject to Change) May 16, 2026 (Sat) 19:30 – 22:30 (JST) A detailed timetable will be announced at a later date.SJ60 Limited-Edition Collaboration MerchandiseExclusive collaboration merchandise featuring newly illustrated visuals will be available both onsite and through advance online sales, through an event-exclusive website. Items ship to Japan and all 11 countries and regions in Southeast Asia. For detailed information, please visit the official collaboration website. ・ Replica Uniform (1 type)・ Acrylic Stands (4 types): February 16, 2026, 10:00 (JST): March 1, 2026, 17:00 (JST)* With limited exceptions, merchandise will be available primarily through advance sales. * On-site sales on match day will be extremely limited. Advance purchase is strongly recommended. * Selected items will be available exclusively via pre-order.For online sales and the latest updates, please visit the official campaign website.Significance as an SJ60 Commemorative EventThis project represents a future-oriented cultural exchange, bringing together Japan’s leading digital entertainment brand and Singapore’s community-rooted Japanese football club .Through the fusion of VTuber culture and live sports, the event aims to create an unprecedented celebration of friendship between Japan and Singapore for the next generation.: Official announcement & merchandise sales begin: Event dayDOU Creations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based business strategy and marketing consultancy dedicated to breaking down market borders and supporting Japanese companies and content to expand overseas, particularly in Southeast Asia. The company provides comprehensive services spanning business strategy development, market research, product planning, and local execution of branding and marketing activities. With a mission to help Japanese products and cultural IP reach global audiences, DOU Creations has supported initiatives such as the operation of Japanese Film Week events and cultural festival booths abroad.

item.title: カバー株式会社による米国での著作権侵害訴訟（「マリアのVTuberにうず」）
item.content:encoded: 米国の裁判資料を検索していたら、おもしろい資料を見つけたので、紹介します。VTuberプロダクション「ホロライブプロダクション」を運営するカバー株式会社によって米国カリフォルニア州北部地区連邦地方裁判所で、カバー株式会社から日本に居住する男性に著作権侵害を理由とした訴訟が提起されています。続きをみる

item.title: Notice of Price Changes (Feb 20 Update)
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Thank you for using the Holoearth service.In a commitment to a more accessible platform for users, we are sold in Holoearth.The revised prices can be confirmed in the in-app purchase screen from the effective date. There will be no change to the purchase price of HoloCoin (Premium). There will be no changes to content that has already been purchased. This revision applies only to ; user-made items will not be affected. Maintenance will be performed on . The specific time will be shared at a later date.Thank you for your continued support.

item.title: Visit both Tokyo Station and Narita Airport shops to get an exclusive postcard!
item.author: narita
item.content:encoded: To celebrate the opening of “hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport!” we are excited to announce a special collaboration campaign with the “hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station.”During the campaign period, bring a receipt from one shop to the other to receive an exclusive, limited-edition postcard (not for sale) as a special gift! Don’t miss this chance to visit both locations and collect these unique rewards. Friday, February 13, 2026 – Monday, March 9, 2026・ hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station Venue: Tokyo Character Street, B1, First Avenue Tokyo Stationhere for more details.・ hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Taking Off at Narita Airport! Venue: Central Bldg. 4F, Terminal 1, Narita Airporthere for more details. 1. Make a purchase at either participating shop. 2. Bring your receipt to the other shop. 3. Show your receipt to the staff at the cashier to receive your postcard.* Staff will mark the receipt once the gift has been redeemed. The exclusive postcards (not for sale) come in 5 designs in total, and designs vary by shop and distribution period.・ At hololive production official shop in Tokyo Station: Phase 1: Feb 13 (Fri) – Feb 27 (Fri) Phase 2: Feb 28 (Sat) – Mar 9 (Mon)・ At hololive Meet Pop up Shop: Phase 1: Feb 13 (Fri) – Feb 20 (Fri) Phase 2: Feb 21 (Sat) – Feb 27 (Fri) Phase 3: Feb 28 (Sat) – Mar 9 (Mon)・ Postcard designs will change according to the schedule at each shop. ・ Supplies are limited and will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis while stocks last. ・ Only receipts issued during the campaign period (Feb 13 – Mar 9, 2026) are valid for redemption. ・ Each receipt is valid for one (1) postcard. ・ We cannot accept returns or exchanges for the postcard, except in the case of defective items. ・ Please check the official website of each facility for business hours and access information.

item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: February 2, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo, Japan; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is thrilled to announce a collaboration with Funko, releasing a series of POP! collectibles featuring hololive production talents Sakura Miko, Mori Calliope, and Takanashi Kiara. This new collection marks the first collaboration between hololive production and Funko. Fans can look forward to these collectibles hitting shelves and opening for global purchase at a later date, also available on the hololive production OFFICIAL STORE from late March 2026.For more information on the product release, please visit Funko’s official website and social media platforms.Funko is a leading pop culture lifestyle brand that creates high quality products for fans to connect with their favorite fandoms. Through its iconic Pop! vinyl figures, apparel, and accessories, the company translates the world’s most popular movies, shows, and digital creators into tangible collectibles.

item.title: Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 12:58 AM EST
Creating a Place Where Talents Shine the Brightest: The Role of a Talent Manager
item.author: COVER_iwasaki
item.content:encoded: Yes. To be honest, these initiatives stemmed from a strong reflection that, as the organization expands rapidly, the systems in place to support talents were unable to keep up with that growth. Until now, hololive production has grown through close collaboration built on deep, one-on-one relationships of trust between talents and their managers. However, when information is contained solely within these “close relationships,” a challenge emerges: as the scale of activities expanded, it became difficult for the organization as a whole to provide swift backup support. There were, in fact, instances in which delayed the sharing of information, such as that concerning the physical condition of the talents, or the response to unexpected situations, resulted in critical feedback that our responses had been “too slow.” We take such feedback very seriously. By relying too heavily on the passion of those on the ground, a single delay ended up placing a significant burden on talents’ physical and mental well-being, as well as on projects themselves. We are determined not to repeat the regret of feeling like the organization could have acted sooner.The reforms currently underway aim to appropriately visualize information that the organization should share and collaborate on, while maintaining the trusted relationships between talents and their managers. While strictly managing the privacy that must be protected, we are moving quickly to establish a system that allows necessary information to be shared in real time with teams and specialized divisions. The introduction of a database and new coordinator positions are not merely about improving efficiency, but of our resolve to ensure that the entire organization has an accurate understanding of each talent’s situation, and can swiftly unite to protect and support them when necessary.

item.title: [hololive] Shop at a convenience store and get a limited clear card!? Usada Pekora × Family Card Campaign Now Rolling Out Nation...
[hololive ID 5th Anniversary] Behind the Scenes of “Chromatic Future”: Nine Talents, One Bridge from Indonesia to the World
item.author: cover_hirata
item.content:encoded: Across hololive production as a whole, many initiatives are designed to reach audiences both inside and outside of Japan. The Japan-based members, for example, aren’t labeled as “JP,” and hololive English is grouped not by geography, but by language. In that context, hololive ID may sometimes be perceived as a group with a more limited regional focus. In reality, however, that isn’t the case at all. One of the defining characteristics of people in Indonesia is that many grow up exposed to multiple languages from an early age, in an environment that readily embraces diverse cultures. hololive ID talents share these same foundations. Their interest in and understanding of different cultures has allowed them to develop a level of fluency in languages such as Indonesian traditional language, and more, and to use these languages naturally across their streams and musical activities. By incorporating multiple languages and cultures, the talents are able to express themselves much more artistically and, because of this underlying potential, I feel that hololive ID has been able to strike a flexible balance between catering to global audiences and local viewers. Their ability to bridge different cultures and values, combined with a high level of adaptability, is perfectly suited for international activities, and I see it as one of hololive ID’s greatest strengths.

SPcollect × hololive English Fragrance Mist Series “MEMORIES” Volume 1 Pre-order Begins January 20
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: January 20, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce a collaboration between SPcollect, under IP mixer, Inc., and hololive English -Myth-. Titled “MEMORIES”, the collaborative fragrance mist series will be available exclusively on the SPcollect official website for a limited one-month period starting Tuesday, January 20, 2026, and is available for worldwide shipping.This collaboration project was personally supervised by Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina’nis, two members of hololive English -Myth-. Together, they present fragrance mists centered around the theme “MEMORIES”. The collection captures the concept of “The Scent of Memories We Shared”, blending the unique identities of the talents with an immersive fragrance experience.This product will be available both internationally and in Japan. Pre-order sales will take place for a starting January 20, 2026 (Tuesday) at 12:00 PM (JST) via SPcollect, IP mixer’s collaboration-focused sales brand.“MEMORIES” Volume 1 Product Details① “MEMORIES” Fragrance Mist The fragrance mists released in this collaboration are formulated as offering versatile usage across a wide range of settings. They can be enjoyed not only as personal fragrances, but also as room, fabric, or bedding sprays, allowing fans to immerse themselves in the fragrance’s world in everyday moments.Both talents took part in the fragrance supervision process, designing the scents with inspiration drawn from the moments they have shared with their fans. Guided by their personal visions of fragrance, exclusive theme illustrations were specially created for this project, further bringing the concept and atmosphere of each scent to life.■ Mori Calliope – Fragrance Notes Introduction Top: Cardamom, Grapefruit, Bergamot, Sweet Orange Middle: Bulgarian Rose, Amber, Cedarwood, Orris Last: Vetiver, Musk, Benzoin, Patchouli■ Ninomae Ina’nis – Fragrance Notes Introduction Top: Fig, Lemon, Raspberry Middle: Cotton, Tea Leaf, Apple Blossom, Lily of the Valley Last: Cedarwood, Thyme, Juniper, White Musk: Fragrance Mist (100 ml) ×1: TWD 1,650 (approx. JPY 8,300)② “MEMORIES” Fragrance Mist Special Set (with Bonus Items) In addition to the standalone fragrance mist available for purchase, a special fragrance mist set with exclusive bonus items is also being released for this collaboration.The special set includes an acrylic stand featuring a newly illustrated key visual, as well as a clear card printed with a personal message and signature from the talent, allowing fans to enjoy a complete collectible experience.The acrylic stand base is specially designed to be displayed together with the fragrance mist bottle, adding a sense of ritual and elegance to the collection. The clear card features a handwritten message and signature from the VTuber, making this a must-have set for fans looking to collect the thoughtfully-designed fragrance sets by Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina’nis. Fragrance Mist (100 ml) ×1 New visual acrylic stand ×1 New visual clear card (Includes Message) ×1: TWD 2,100 (approx. JPY 10,560)③ “MEMORIES” Fragrance Mist Special Duo Set (with Bonus Items) A duo set that includes fragrance mists from both Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina’nis, along with additional exclusive merchandise. In addition to the newly illustrated main visual acrylic stand and clear card, this collaboration also includes an exclusive acrylic charm featuring a special design. Fragrance Mist (100 ml) × 1 New visual acrylic stand × 1 New visual clear card (Includes Message) × 1 New visual Acrylic Keychain × 1 Fragrance Mist (100 ml) × 1 New visual acrylic stand × 1 New visual clear card (Includes Message) × 1 New visual Acrylic Keychain × 1: TWD 3,950 (approx. JPY 19,860)Pre-order Sales InformationFans can pre-order the “MEMORIES” Fragrance Mist series through the SPcollect official website (Global & Japan).■ YouTube Livestream Announcement Details and product information for this release will be introduced via livestream by Ninomae Ina’nis and Mori Calliope on Sunday, February 8, 2026, at 8:00 PM (JST). Archived viewing will be available after the stream.IP mixer, a subsidiary of MicroAd, Inc., operates a business focused on planning and selling IP-based products. Collaborating with VTubers and other domestic and international IPs, IP mixer develops and sells original cosmetics, merchandise, and collaborative products for a global audience. Through both original products and tie-up promotions with manufacturers, stores, and facilities, IP mixer maximizes IP value and opens new markets worldwide.SPcollect is a sales brand operated by IP mixer specializing in IP collaboration projects. With a globally experienced creative team, SPcollect delivers innovative concepts and unforgettable experiences to fans around the world.

hololive x CAPSULE Announces “Dive into hololive” Collaboration and Cafe from February 27, 2026!
item.author: os_pr
item.content:encoded: January 19, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is excited to announce the second phase of a collaboration between hololive production, CAPSULE, OU-EN Cafe, and the National Museum of Marine Science and Technology (NMMST): the “Dive into hololive cafe.” Running between February 27 to April 26, fans will be able to partake in photo spots, an exclusive goods pop-up store, and a stamp rally as they dive into the underwater world of Keeleung.For the collectors out there, the NMMST Pop-Up Store is stocking venue-exclusive merchandise, including random shikishi boards, custom noren curtains, and limited-edition clear files. Fans can also pre-order “Dive into hololive cafe” merchandise from January 21, 2026 at 12:00 PM (UTC+8).For more information on the event, please visit OU-EN CAFE’s official social media platforms. “Dive into hololive” is a two-part collaboration event where talents Yukihana Lamy, Ninomae Ina’nis, Koseki Bijou, and Juufutei Raden appear to the fans as “undersea princesses” in a new key visual. The upcoming cafe features a fresh visual identity that exudes an ocean theme, with the four talents debuting brand-new outfits that bring a whole new vibe. Expect a totally different merch lineup at the cafe, too!Fans can find exclusive on-site merchandise featuring talents as undersea princesses at NMMST.The first round of cafe merch pre-orders opens on January 21, 2026, at 12:00 PM (UTC+8). As a bonus for joining the fun, fans who purchase a “Dive into hololive” NMMST ticket bundle will receive both NMMST stamp rally access and a for limited-edition cafe merchandise to use at the “Dive into hololive cafe.”Tickets for the NMMST event are selling fast on KKTIX! Check out the full event details below which includes a merchandise pre-order link, and stay tuned to OU-EN CAFE socials for the menu reveal.Event Information: “Dive into hololive” at NMMST National Museum of Marine Science and Technology (NMMST) No. 367, Beining Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Keelung City Feb 27, 2026 (Fri) – Mar 27, 2026 (Fri) Weekdays (Tue–Fri): 09:00–17:00 (Closed Mondays) Weekends (Sat–Sun): Most areas extended to 18:00 Note: NMMST hours are subject to official museum announcements. Available on KKTIX and ibon* Pre-order bonuses vary by platform and bundle. Get them while supplies last! * Important: The “Commemorative Ticket Stub” is for collection only. You must present a valid NMMST Main Exhibition Building admission ticket to enter.Event Information: “Dive into hololive cafe” OU-EN CAFE No. 25, Jinxi St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City Mar 14, 2026 (Sat) – Apr 26, 2026 (Sun)Merch Pre-order: Starts Jan 21, 2026 (Wed) at 12:00 PM (UTC+8)

item.title: ホロライブ3期生、Kアリーナ横浜で2DAYSライブ開催決定！「#きゅるるん大作戦」チケット受付開始
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 「ホロライブ」所属の3期生（兎田ぺこら、不知火フレア、白銀ノエル、宝鐘マリン）によるライブイベント「hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜」を、に「Kアリーナ横浜」にて開催することを発表しました。本ライブは、「ホロライブ」所属の3期生4名が出演するライブイベントです。本日10月19日（日）21:00より、現地会場指定席チケットの1次先行（hololive FANCLUB先行 / 抽選）が開始されるとともに、「ABEMA」「SPWN」「ZAIKO」にて配信チケットの販売も開始されました。チケット情報などライブの最新情報は、下記特設サイト及び開催概要をご確認ください。hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜 概要 hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜 主催：カバー株式会社 兎田ぺこら 不知火フレア 白銀ノエル 宝鐘マリンDAY1 ： 2026年1月17日（土） 開場 16:30 / 配信開始 17:30 / 開演 18:00DAY2 ： 2026年1月18日（日） 開場 15:30 / 配信開始 16:30 / 開演 17:00 Kアリーナ横浜 （〒220-8507 神奈川県横浜市西区みなとみらい6丁目2−14） 最寄り駅 〇新高島駅 みなとみらい線4臨港パーク口より徒歩5分 〇みなとみらい駅 みなとみらい線2いちょう通り口より徒歩12分 ※お1人様2枚までお申し込み可能です。 ※チケット氏名印字あり。■1次先行（hololive FANCLUB先行 / 抽選）受付期間：2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2025年10月29日（水） 23:59当選確認期間・入金期間：2025年11月5日（水）15:00 ～ 2025年11月9日（日）23:00※お申し込みには、hololive FANCLUBへの入会が必要となります。※別途手数料（先行サービス料440円、システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。受付期間：2025年11月13日（木）21:00 ～ 2025年11月23日（日）23:59当選確認期間・入金期間：2025年11月28日（金）15:00 ～ 2025年12月1日（月）23:00※別途手数料（先行サービス料440円、システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。受付期間・発券開始：2025年12月14日（日）12:00 ～※別途手数料（システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。 2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2026年2月18日（水）20:00 公演終了後、公開準備ができ次第アーカイブ視聴可能となり、2026年2月18日（水）23:59 まで何度でもご視聴いただけます。 ※2026年2月18日（水）23:59 を過ぎると、アーカイブ視聴中でも視聴できなくなります。 ※プラットフォームごとに別途手数料が発生する場合があります。本公演開催に合わせ、本日10月19日（日）よりhololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜のライブグッズが解禁されました。 2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2025年11月25日（火）18:00 まで販売期間や注意事項・詳細は、公式HPの販売ページなどをご確認ください。

[hololive ID 5th Anniversary] The 5-Year Journey of hololive Indonesia
item.author: cover_hirata
item.content:encoded: In True Indonesian Style Backed by Data: Born from a Nation of YouthThe Southeast Asian archipelago made up of over 17,000 islands that is Indonesia is known for being a “nation of youth” where around half of its population is 29 or younger and is also one of the most multilingual countries in the world with over 700 languages spoken nationwide, characterized by its diverse language and culture. Since the second half of the 1980s, popular Japanese anime has been shown in Indonesia, making it a country with a high awareness of Japanese pop culture for some time now, not just anime.It was into this landscape in April 2020 that the first hololive production VTuber group outside of Japan was born with three talents in Generation 1, with 3 more talents following suit in December of the same year as part of Generation 2, doubling the number of unique talents and with it the fan base grew. At that time, those who were aware of hololive within Indonesia were still only those who consumed Japanese anime and had an interest in Japanese culture. However, through constant streaming and activities from Generation 1 and 2 members, this level of interest steadily grew. Then, when Generation 1 talent Moona Hoshinova’s channel became the first in Southeast Asia to reach 1 million subscribers, everything began to change. VTubers were no longer just “novel content for anime lovers,” but were being recognized as individual streamers as internet culture in Indonesia continued to thrive. It was also at this time that we were able to accumulate data, through the activities of Generation 1 and 2 talents, about what genres and music were well-received among Indonesians. Based on this data, from Generation 3, which debuted in March 2022, onwards, we have reflected Indonesian culture and trends more in our audition methods and visuals. As a result, hololive became far more well-known locally with Kobo Kanaeru following in the footsteps of Moona Hoshinova and Kureiji Ollie, becoming the fastest hololive ID to reach 1 million subscribers on her YouTube channel, reaching the milestone in just four months after her channel was created. Following on from this, in August 2022, to mark 7 million subscribers across all hololive ID talents, a commemorative advertisement was put up in Senayan Station, part of the Jakarta subway system (MRT Jakarta). hololive ID talents could be seen throughout the city and were becoming a part of daily life in Indonesia. The VTuber boom in Indonesia and the various challenges posed to previous generations gave us crucial insights into what kind of content and activities are commonly enjoyed locally—from music and gaming genres to communication styles. These learnings have not only heavily influenced how the Generation 3 debut project was managed, but also all hololive ID-related decision-making processes regarding offline events and local promotions ever since.Since 2022, hololive ID talents have featured at the annual hololive SUPER EXPO & fes. in Japan, with their incredible singing ability and dance performances a huge hit among fans. In September 2022, the three Generation 1 talents revealed their 3D models on a relay stream, and increased the scope of their activities that included a tour of Asia* in 2023.*International Event: “VRChat Presents viv:ID CRUISE hololive Meet Asia Tour”Respecting Indonesian Culture: An Appeal Born from a Unique IdentitySo, why have hololive ID talents been so well received by viewers in Indonesia and many other parts of the world? We believe that there are a number of reasons for this. The appeal of VTubers that have the support of a global community stems from the talents all having their own strong individuality, and their ability to have bilateral communication with their viewers. hololive ID adapts this characteristic appeal to suit the Indonesian language and culture. In particular, forms of “wrestling-style” communication between talents and viewers are frequent, where Indonesian slang, known as bahasa gaul, and jokes are used to make jibes at each other, bringing about a closer and more friendly form of interaction with local viewers. Many of the hololive ID members are also multilingual allowing them to “code-switch,” whereby they naturally switch between multiple languages during the same stream, making the group particularly unique with its ambiguous geographical and linguistic boundaries, endearing itself with not only the Indonesian public, but with Japanese and Western fans as well.These strengths are evident in the content of talents’ streams, their fan communities and, above all, their original music.On the musical front, songs like Kobo Kanaeru’s “Oh! Asmara” and Moona Hoshinova’s “Perisai Jitu” are characterized by their Indonesian pop influences, making them highly acclaimed locally in Indonesia. These songs have transcended the VTuber fan base and become huge hits, making waves on the national music streaming charts. On the other hand, other songs feature a blend of multiple languages such as English and Japanese and are being released with a more global audience in mind.The presence of both an approachability stemming from local influences to a universality which resonates with a global audience is what makes hololive ID so unique. hololive ID, with its uniquely Indonesian languages and culture as well as its boldness and individuality that connects with a global audience, has seen its fan base continue to grow, not only within Indonesia but far and wide throughout Japan, South Asia and North America, blossoming into a group boasting diversity even within the production. Each and every talent of hololive ID has been a pioneer in bringing Indonesian culture and VTubers to the global market. Some fans may remember the oddity of anime-looking characters speaking Indonesian in the beginning when hololive ID first became active as a group, but the talents’ efforts to stay true to their culture and values while continuing to produce content that can be enjoyed by anyone regardless of nationality may just be what has made hololive ID so uniquely appealing. Since 2023, the group’s activities have diversified even further through offline events and collaborations with other companies. February 2023 saw all 9 affiliated talents reveal their new kimono outfits on a relay stream, and then in August, they announced their VRChat Presents viv:ID CRUISE hololive Meet Asia Tour, with 4 of the members touring Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia and New York. This saw a steady increase in offline engagement with fans, with appearances by ID talents at both hololive STAGE World Tour’24 -Soar!- and hololive STAGE World Tour ’25 -Synchronize!- in 2024 and 2025, showcasing their global presence.Collaborations and campaigns domestically with Indonesian businesses have also been well-received. Kureiji Ollie and Kobo Kanaeru made an appearance in a promotion for the staple instant noodles Indomie from Indonesian food/beverage giant Indofood, which originally came about by the brand simply being mentioned on stream, enabling the presence of VTubers to be more widely known outside of original fan communities. Kobo Kanaeru also appeared in a commercial for the Honda BeAT, a popular scooter in Indonesia. A fusion of live-action and 3D elements, the commercial was nominated at the YouTube Works Awards Southeast Asia 2025, winning Best Collaboration: Brand & Creator. On top of this, 2025 also saw a domestic collaboration with Pocky. hololive ID has played a considerable role in not only promoting local companies within the Indonesian market through such campaigns as receiving hololive ID photo cards when purchasing products, but has worked with international companies achieving similar success as well.In November 2025, numerous fans gathered at Comic Frontier 21 ICE BSD Hall 6 for hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary live Chromatic Future, the group’s first-ever concert in Indonesia featuring all hololive ID members to celebrate its 5-year anniversary, which was a resounding success. Five years on, hololive ID has been a social phenomenon going beyond the realm of entertainment; a success story in the digital creation industry in Indonesia made through successes had in music streaming charts and collaborations with other brands. Moving forward, we are looking to expand activities based in Indonesia even further while continuing to collaborate even closer with the entire hololive production.In the second part of this series, we will bring you interviews with event staff who worked on the hugely successful hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future, and share some of the ideas and sentiments that went into the production.https://coveredge.cover-corp.com/en/list/4013[hololive ID 5th Anniversary] Behind the Scenes of “Chromatic Future”: Nine Talents, One Bridge from Indonesia to the World | COVERedgeLaunched in 2020 as the overseas branch of hololive, hololive Indonesia (hereinafter “hololive ID”) has since expanded its activities beyond Southeast Asia to Japan and English-speaking regions around the world. In November 2025, hololive Indonesia marked its fifth anniversary with a special commemorative concert, “hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future (hereinafter “Chromatic Future”). Chromatic Future took place as part of the Indonesian creator convention Comic Frontier, bringing together all nine members from hololive ID’s three generations for a special joint performance. In addition to the concert itself, the event also offered “hololive Indonesia Fan Festival” a special booth exhibition zone dedicated to hololive ID. For this article, we sat | COVERedge
